name: product-management
description: 产品经理全流程工具箱，覆盖PRD撰写、用户故事拆解、竞品分析、需求优先级排序、用户反馈分析、产品指标复盘、路线图更新和产品脑暴八大核心场景。每个技能内置行业方法论、条件分支和输出模板，产出可直接交付。连接文档平台可将PRD和报告直接写入团队知识库，连接表格工具可读写需求池和反馈数据，连接任务工具可将拆解结果自动创建为待办任务，连接项目管理工具可自动同步迭代状态。
descriptionEn: An end-to-end product management toolkit covering eight core workflows: PRD writing, user story breakdown, competitive analysis, requirement prioritization, user feedback analysis, product metrics review, roadmap updates, and product brainstorming. Each skill includes built-in methodologies, conditional branching, and output templates for delivery-ready results. Connect a docs platform to push PRDs and reports straight into your team wiki, connect a spreadsheet tool to read/write requirement backlogs and feedback data, connect a task tracker to auto-create actionable to-dos from breakdowns, or connect a project management tool to sync iteration status automatically.
